query.original: Can you use Action Surge to cast two leveled spells in one turn?
query.used: Can you use Action Surge to cast two leveled spells in one turn?

answer: I cannot find this in the provided rules that you can use Action Surge to cast two leveled spells in one turn. Action Surge only allows you to take one additional action on top of your regular action and a possible bonus action. Casting a spell is considered an action, so you cannot cast two leveled spells in one turn using Action Surge alone.

It fails to acknowledge that Action Surge allows for the casting of two leveled spells in one turn under the right conditions, which is a key aspect of the query.
